basic_details.job_title: MVH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Maharishi Valmiki Hospital (MVH Delhi) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 15 Senior Resident Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the MVH Delhi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 50 years for SC/ST and 48 years for OBC (Delhi) Candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in concerned specialty, 02 years Experience of Govt. Hospital/Govt. Institution in the concerned specialty (if PG not available)

content_sections.heading: MVH Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MVH Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MVH Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Age Limit as on Date of Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MVH Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital, Delhi.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in the concerned specialty, or 02 years of experience in a Government Hospital/Institution if PG is not available.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation available: 50 years for SC/ST candidates and 48 years for OBC (Delhi) candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 67700 Per Month, which is in Revised Pay Matrix 11 of the 7th CPC, plus other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted from 10:00 am to 12:00 Noon every working Friday.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.
